metadata.description: /ship — take a feature from idea to merged in one command. Two gates, auto-opening review cards, gate notifications, a stage-aware status line, and a model-routed build.

plugins.name: ship
plugins.description: /ship — idea to merged in one command: worktree → discover → plan → build → review, gating only on design direction and 'go'. Auto-opening HTML cards, gate desktop notifications, a stage-aware status line, and a BUILD stage routed ~50/50 across Opus and GPT-5.5. Bundles the router skill.
